state.text: Governance Atlas BY ENTRADA GOVERN Command Center Discover Stewardship KNOWLEDGE Glossary & CDEs Lineage Atlas TRUST Audit Evidence Control Center S Skyler Admin Workspace › local ⌘K UC connected · 89.8% coverage Atlas AI WORKSPACE-SCOPED METADATA Workspace-scoped app-principal view; actor-scoped protected reads stay restricted. GLOSSARY & CDE REGISTRY Shared business meaning, anchored to data Glossary terms link to source-of-record assets. Critical Data Elements have stricter ownership, certification, and lineage requirements. + New term Glossary 0 CDE Registry 21 Showing 5 of 21 CDE registry rows CDE SOURCE-OF-RECORD COLUMN OWNER RECERT STATUS Customer Identity Quality Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Customer Profile Coverage Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Customer Stewardship Executive Feed Table Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Customer Stewardship Lineage Dashboard Feed Table Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Customer Stewardship Priority Workbench Table Source column unavailable customer-steward@entrada.ai 90d Source unavailable Status and recertification are registry metadata values. Quality test-run or recertification workflow proof appears only when backed evidence is returned. Atlas AI Grounded in available governance metadata - no raw rows read x Atlas AI recommendations require a configured Databricks Genie space. TRY ASKING ? Which CDEs are due for review? → ? What assets are linked to
